steps.title: Identify the year signal
steps.content: The notes state that Le Sidaner’s painting Window on the Bay of Villefranche was honored in 1925.

steps.title: Apply the year signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly incorporates the year 1925, showing exactly when Le Sidaner won the Carnegie Prize gold medal. Choices A, B, and C either leave out the year or misrepresent the event. That matches choice D — D is correct.
